mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(AUTH_LOG_ID), 0) + 1 FROM LQ_BUSINESS_AUTH_LOG
INSERT INTO LQ_BUSINESS_AUTH_LOG ( AUTH_LOG_ID, BUSINESS_ID, LOCATION_ID, USER_ID, AUTH_TYPE, PAYMENT_AMOUNT, SETTLEMENT_AMT, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{logId}, #{businessId}, #{locationId}, #{userId}, #{authType}, NVL(#{paymentAmount}, 0), NVL(#{settlementAmount}, 0), SYSDATE )
